This template is for **Azure DevOps Remote MCP Server feedback only**.

**Important**
**Internal Microsoft users:** Do **NOT** file issues here. Please use the internal Teams channel to share your feedback.

## Issue Type

Select the option that best describes your issue.

- [ ] Feedback on Remote MCP Server
- [ ] Bug in Remote MCP Server
- [ ] Tool or feature request for Remote MCP Server

## Tool(s)

If this issue is related to an **existing tool**, provide the exact tool name(s).

If this is a **new tool request**, include the proposed tool name and a brief description of what it should do.

## Description

Provide details about the issue.

For issues with existing tools, include:

- Tool name(s)
- Prompts used
- Error messages (if applicable)

For new tool requests, include:

- A clear description of the requested capability
- Why the capability is needed
- Any example scenarios where it would be used
